first_metal.method: com.apple.metal and com.apple.metalfe user caches moved aside before a foreground daemon launch, restored afterwards; deltas taken from the daemon's own timestamped log
first_metal.visible_preparing_basis: Status Item is up 0.06 s after launch and the READY line lands only after the helper-warm line; the selected-backend headline reads preparing until then
first_metal.capture_accepted_basis: no Capture accepted before READY: the READY print gates acceptance and the lifecycle suite's helper_recovery scenario (ready_only_after_warmup) covers the gating; warm-cache launch-to-warm on the same install measured 2028 ms (runtime probe)
